notes: Audit only — no edits applied. Strong finance-first SSOT chapter for AGENTS/ReAct/tool-use; ch04 correctly owns ReAct (def:react-trajectory) and PRA (def:pra-loop). Three blocking defects: (1) demo.ipynb is a placeholder yet promised 3x (chapter.tex:419,732,1123) — caps reproducibility & code_figure_correctness; (2) duplicate \label{def:rag} collides with 02-llm-foundations:1972 — caps notation_crossref; (3) zhang2024financebench bib entry has a [CHECK] stub and apparently wrong author list. citation_accuracy capped at 89 (NEEDS_EXTERNAL_VERIFICATION) for esma2018mifid2 (suitability guideline cited for Article 16 record-keeping), kurshan2024agenticregulator (year/arXiv-id mismatch), and FinanceBench/FinSage numeric claims. All 35 cite keys resolve uniquely. Figure matches its notebook code and runs clean. BOOK_WIDE: ch05 re-derives ReAct without \Cref at the point of re-derivation; RAG defined in two chapters.
